name: Moby
bio: Moby's catalog continues to earn through streaming, licensing, and long-tail discovery, with Play-era songs still functioning as major commercial assets.
notable_for: Play-era sync dominance, durable crossover electronic catalog, and creator-led rights participation.
career_highlight: Play became one of the defining catalog-licensing success stories in electronic music.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes continued streaming and licensing around Play-era songs and stronger-than-average creator-side economics.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-controlled rights and meaningful creator-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears materially tied to writer-side interests
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No major catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: Moby's catalog economics are likely stronger than a typical performer-only catalog because licensing and authorship matter heavily.
